title: albizia tomentella subsp. rotundata
intro: Albizia tomentella subsp. rotundata, also known as the Rotundate Albizia, is a plant species found in tropical regions, particularly in Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The Rotundate Albizia is used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, offering benefits like reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and improving digestion. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or tincture, and can be used in herbal remedies, teas, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
